raw_title: The Weight of the Rainbow: LGBTQ+ Journalists’ Navigation of Mental Health and Identity in Digital News Ecosystems
title_en: The Weight of the Rainbow: LGBTQ+ Journalists’ Navigation of Mental Health and Identity in Digital News Ecosystems
title_zh: 彩虹的重量：LGBTQ+记者在数字新闻生态系统中对心理健康与身份的探索
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了LGBTQ+记者如何在数字新闻环境中处理自己的身份和心理健康问题。它关注这些记者在工作中面临的独特挑战，以及数字媒体如何影响他们的职业和个人生活。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how LGBTQ+ journalists navigate their identity and mental health in digital news environments. It focuses on the unique challenges these journalists face in their work and how digital media affects their professional and personal lives.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注数字新闻行业中少数群体记者的职业体验和心理健康，探索身份认同与工作环境的互动关系，为媒体多样性和员工福祉提供见解。
research_direction_en: The research examines the professional experiences and mental health of minority journalists in digital news, exploring the interaction between identity and work environments to provide insights into media diversity and employee well-being.
